page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web server for iterative protein sequence database searching by dynamic programming. Sensitivity and selectivity outperform PSI-BLAST. The server allows a range of different protein sequence databases to be searched including the SCOP database of protein domains.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web server for iterative protein sequence database searching by dynamic programming. Sensitivity and selectivity outperform PSI-BLAST. The server allows a range of different protein sequence databases to be searched including the SCOP database of protein domains.
